title: Exec Jones
compiled_truth: Exec Jones is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2001-05-22 to 2002-05-24), Exec Jones sent 16 and received 194 emails, totalling 210 interactions. Top correspondents: [Louise Kitchen](people/louise-kitchen) (10), [David Oxley](people/david-oxley) (2), [Harry Arora](people/harry-arora) (1), [Vladimir Gorny](people/vladimir-gorny) (1), [Sally Beck](people/sally-beck) (1). Mailbox folders observed: _americas, deleted_items, inbox, personnel.
